channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: ‘Cut up the credit cards:’ Congress is getting brutal about ‘embarrassing’ $31 trillion national debt
item.description: "It’s only going to get worse until we cut up the credit cards and get serious."

item.title: The fruit fly cancer researcher who built his first prototype out of lollipop sticks and straws
item.description: For biomedical scientist Caíque Costa, fruit flies are where cancer breakthroughs begin. But caring for flies in a lab isn’t as easy as you may think.

item.title: SEON CEO: Prediction markets can forecast the future. Can they survive their own manipulation problem?
item.description: The prediction markets supercycle has outpaced its regulatory infrastructure — and the next 12 months of CFTC rulemaking will determine

item.title: Brian Niccol’s nascent Starbucks turnaround starts with treating workers better
item.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.
